name: Magma Fincorp Limited
summary: Magma Fincorp Limited, a non-banking financial company, provides asset finance services in India. The company offers loans for cars, SMEs, construction equipment, commercial vehicles, tractors, and used vehicles. It also provides housing finance; and auto leasing services. The company operates a network of 314 branches. Magma Fincorp Limited was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
